intent: we are not going to build the Forge platform. We are going to build the Mac Consensus Dev Agent. Utilize the local files to develop the PRDs and the README, AGENTS and CLAUDE markdown files in the github repository to build the PRD plan
scope_statement:
Build the PRD plan generation subsystem of the Consensus Dev Agent — a native macOS AI coding agent. Per TRD-3 Section 8.1, for each PRDItem in the plan: generate a full PRD via the Consensus Engine (TRD-2), export as .docx for operator review, show inline preview in the build stream, present a per-PRD review gate (yes/skip/stop/correction→regenerate), commit approved PRD markdown to GitHub, and mark completion in ThreadStateStore. The PRD plan itself is derived from the plain-language build intent decomposition described in the README and forge_architecture_context: the agent takes a build intent, decomposes it into an ordered PRD plan, then decomposes each PRD into a sequence of pull requests using two-model consensus (Claude + GPT-4o) with Claude arbitrating.

Clarifications:
